reviews.review_description:
This is one of the coziest and most beautiful games I’ve ever experienced. The "dollhouse" format, where you are inside the rabbit hole peeking into different diorama rooms, is just brilliant. It feels like you’re a tiny part of a massive, living storybook.
The puzzles are very satisfying, logical, and never feel like a chore. There’s no stress or rushing against the clock—you can just take your time and admire every character and every detail of this amazing world. The story is told so sweetly, and the Wonderland atmosphere is captured perfectly.
The music also deserves a special mention—it creates that melancholic, fairytale vibe that stays with you long after. I enjoyed every second of it. This is a perfect example of what a story-driven VR adventure should be. If you like high-quality quests without the rush, this is a 10/10!

Didn’t take too long to finish (3-4 hours with lots of breaks over two separate days). The visuals were pretty and clever way to navigate the different rooms and look around for clues and invitations to collect. Would purchase again and recommend. I’m looking for similar games to try next!
Please make more stories like that - I will keeping buying, I have the other one also. Please make more thx

Makes use of the VR medium well!! Even tho its 3rd person, the game makes use of many opportunities to incorporate vr elements. Excellent job devs!!! I played with QGO, so the resolution was close to double for me, and it still ran flawlessly on quest 3.
Probably the best game I’ve played.

I really wasn't sure if I liked this, but took a chance got the bundle including Escape from Wonderland and I'm glad I did. Just at the early stages of Down the Rabbit Hole and it's so enjoyable to play. Looking forward to experiencing it and moving on to Wonderland. Highly recommended. My main reticence was whether it was aimed at the younger audience but it's not. Some humor in there too that will make you laugh and the characters are so full of personality. The voice acting and narration is superb which really adds to the experience.

I have gone thru some games, seriously.  Returned so many as they were not intuitive to figure out, couldn't get them to work, made me sick and/or the tutorial sucked.  This game I sorted out right away, doesn't make me motion sick, quirky (as you would expect!) and fun.  Such a creative approach to the whole experience I am truly impressed. It was what I was expecting the Meta VR to be about and this one finally nailed it. I am almost thru the 2nd level and not looking forward to it ending and having to go thru trials again to find a game such as this.  Be nice if we could skip thru some of the dialogue but worth going thru it for such a well done game.  Thank you!

I originally bought this game when I had my quest 2.  Spent a few minutes and didn't think much of it.  Shelved it for a year. Then upgraded to a quest 3. Got bored one night thought I'd give it a shot..  Amazing!  The attention to detail was amazing the voiceovers were perfection so true to the Alice in wonderland style I grew up with.  The game is perfect.  And irritating finding the invitations.  Challenge accepted.  One of the best games I've ever played.

Great game 10/10. Not the most complex, in reality not really complex, but very very fun. Just frustrating enough sometimes, and of course a feel-good payout at the end of tasks. Looking forward to playing it several more times with different stories.

My first non-first-person VR game and it worked wonderfully, interacting with the world and helping Alice solve puzzles and find invitations was more fun than I expected! I usually ignore collectables if I don't naturally come across them, but this game's charm had me hunting for every last invitation and enjoying the process.

nothing happens 
no way to reset the game, clear cache or anything

The game has good graphics and art style. The puzzles are cool, and the idea of switching to first-person in some scenes is interesting, but the game is a bit short and has low replay value. It's not as good as the Moss series, but it's still a good and entertaining platformer.

I was hoping for a decent puzzling game here and I got that and much more. This game is a work of art and an ode to all Alice in Wonderland fans with all the characters and dreamy adventure. And the unique style and game controls made me fall in love with this game immediately. Very well done and a must play casual sit down game. 🔥🔥❤️🥂😁

I enjoyed this game so much, I finished it too quickly and found myself sad that there wasn’t more. 

It has a great balance between story and puzzles. The adventure is so fun. 
Movement is easy and the perspective is perfection. 

My only complaint is that I made it to the end and was still missing a couple invitations. I had already run the entire map a few times, so I resorted to looking for hints on the internet. I wish those invitations were slightly more obvious. 

If you like Moss, you should also enjoy this game.

Love the games (the sequel to this one too), but too short for the price.  This one and the other I can get through in a couple hours.  Throw in some more sort of puzzles, like maybe some hidden object puzzles, or other fun puzzles.  I really enjoy the content and it is fun to play, but for the prices of the games I'd like to be able to have more than a few hours of fun.

Really enjoyed this. It was a great experience with a fun story and characters. Has some excellent art and voice acting too. Length was just right for me at a little under three hours, including full completion. Only real flaws was that it was a little on the easy side, has a bit of backtracking, and has very little replay value. Despite those, I'd recommend it.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games every
reviews.review_description: This game was so much fun and I had the best time the puzzles were so difficult to figure out 😂 but I still had a great time I see many people complaining about how little there was but I do see an opportunity for a dlc sequel for Alice’s new story overall 10/10 I loved this

Great adventure game. Some how missed some invitation. Took awhile to figure the flowers out but nailed it. 
Who ever programmed the game did a wonderful job of graphics. 
Please let me know if you release anything else like this. 
Thank you

Really incredible - played this one after the companion game (Escaping Wonderland).  No need to play them in any order, it was fun though to see some of the same characters and locations.  This one feels a bit less sophisticated in terms of collectibles, puzzle, and level design but is still great.

It does have a couple more mature themes introduced in the first few minutes (poor Mr. Rabbit’s kids…) so just be aware depending on if you share it with your kids.

Nonetheless definitely worth experiencing!
Loved everything about this game when I finished it I had to immediately buy escaping wonderland ￼
Completely blow my mind with new concept in VR I've never seen before. My only complain is that it's too short, I didn't want it to end.

I love the art style and the way you can look around the environments. However, as a game it's quite limited in my opinion, yes it's a shorter experience but I was expecting more puzzles. The most direct comparison would be Moss which has more in the way of combat and puzzles. If your looking for a storybook come to life this is could make sense but for 2025 and onwards I would say your better off skipping this and just playing Escaping Wonderland from the same developer instead.

This game is unbelievable. I love the detail on the characters. Some of the puzzles are challenging and cause you to think a little. As far as the game plays, I had no issues with the mechanics. It plays buttery smooth! I hope to see more games like this as I have been into vr since the create your own vr experience using cardboard days! Thanks!

reviews.review_title: An Epic Story For All  Ages
reviews.review_description:
When I saw Escaping Wonderland was coming, I simply had to get this game first.
A platform game like no other, simply stunning and charming in every way.
You really grow to love all the characters good and bad.
Gameplay is pure genius, the way it surrounds you and engulfs you into the magical world Down the rabbit hole.
One of my best games of 2024.

I didn’t want it to end! But I did want to get to the party…that was so beautiful. The whole game was just lovely. The diorama was something to see for sure. I loved all the rooms and of the characters, the artwork is gorgeous. The puzzles weren’t difficult, but took some thinking and searching to complete them. I can’t wait to start Escaping Wonderland. Thank you so much developers for this great experience.

I have to say this VR game is quite impressive to say the least.  Great storyline, great visuals!  I like that you can switch from third to first person in certain rooms.  I love how you can position the screen and move yourself in and out of the space in front of you.   Well done!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to drop us a review!

reviews.review_description:
This is incredible!
The polish, graphics, sounds, effects,  voice acting! 

The style of the game is like nothing I’ve experienced before!… it’s so cool! Love moving the view of the rooms about and zooming in. 
And how it changes into first person view at times aswell and you get to choose multiple choice answers, is just great!

Story is perfectly done!

Puzzles are clever and fun to solve aswell.

Highly recommend this wonderful experience of a game!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to review! We're so happy to hear you enjoyed Down the Rabbit Hole! ✨

reviews.review_description:
It's a really cool experience. I loved it. Can't wait to play the next one.
MORE GAMES LIKE THIS PLEASE!

Do not miss out on this piece of art. I'm a 48 years old man who watches combat sports. I can say this game will appeal to everyone! Great game with thoughtful challenges and immersive gameplay. Buy it as a gift for someone you like.

developer_response.body: We're so glad you enjoyed the game and validating that it's fit for most audiences ;) Thank you for taking the time to review!

reviews.review_title: A great example of classic story.
reviews.review_description: This will be one of the games that I show to people who have never played a VR game before.

Alice in wonderland has always been my favorite story and this was so cool worth every cent the puzzles are challenging but fun my only complaint is it’s so short I finished the storyline in only a few days would love a longer version and maybe give more screen time to some other characters like the hatter and Cheshire Cat (my personal favorites)

reviews.review_title: I thought I was late to the party.
reviews.review_description:
Down the Rabbit Hole is a magical and immersive VR adventure that completely blew me away! From the moment I stepped into its enchanting world, I felt like I was truly part this whimsical Wonderland. The game masterfully blends clever puzzles, creative storytelling, and stunning visuals that make every moment an absolute joy.
The ability to explore from multiple perspectives and interact with quirky, memorable characters adds depth and charm to the experience. The controls are intuitive, and the design feels polished, making it easy to lose yourself in the game for hours.
Whether you're a fan of Alice in Wonderland or just love a well-crafted VR experience,  this is a must-play. It’s an unforgettable journey filled with wonder and surprises at every turn. Highly recommended!
the game is beautiful, the scenario very good. it's still too easy. the only problem is that it's very short for the price.

Wow!  I would buy a VR headset just for this game alone if I didn't already have one!   The artistic detail is enchanting.  For anyone who enjoys doll houses, you have to get this.  (If you don't that's okay, it's still a fun experience) You can either view the rooms from the outside or stick your big ole head right in the room for a moment!  A couple of rooms you get to shrink down and go in scale to view.  (not walk around though, I don't want to mislead)  The game keeps adding new rooms and you control the cute girl as she walks through.  The little rabbits are adorable, I keep going back to visit them.  

I like that the puzzles don't exasperate those of us who use VR as a break from thinking all day. They aren't obvious at first, but not cumbersome.  This is such a cool world the developers have made!  I will never get tired of this.

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for the glowing review! 💖 We're so glad you enjoyed our diorama world in Down the Rabbit Hole, if you're looking for more, a tad longer gameplay and a deeper narrative, we also just released the spiritual successor "Escaping Wonderland"! 🙏

reviews.review_description: I’ve been wanting to play a VR game that would just take you to a magical place, where I can maybe remember what it was like being a kid, playing adventure games, and this game is exactly that! What an amazing experience, I love that the places you visit, you have a 3rd person high level view of them, and it’s not always immersed. It seriously gives me lucasarts adventure game vibes, but in VR.

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for the kind words and for taking the time to drop us a note, we really appreciate it! If you're looking for more whimsical magic, we also just launched "Escaping Wonderland" as a spiritual successor 🙏

reviews.review_title: This is frustrating and not enjoyable
reviews.review_description: This is not an easy game to play. I had to find a YouTube video to try and figure out where things were. You don’t want to stop and look at the video and have to go back in. There are no hints in the game. Frustrating.
This game is so unique and beautiful in so many ways and I absolutely love the storyline! I love it so much!

I’m really disappointed. I love Alice in Wonderland and this game is just awful. I thought it would be immersive but it’s just a flat cartoon scene in front of you where you try to figure out puzzles. None of it felt like it was VR or 3D. If I could get a refund I would.
Too much $ for a game with a total 2 hour play time
Not my cup of tea..

It's a really good game, but I would say it's for children. It's not overly complicated or difficult to play. It was not an immersive game. It felt like a regular controller game just in a 360 view. It was not long enough. I would of preferred it to be longer.

reviews.review_title: Kids completed the game in a day
reviews.review_description: Why are these games so expensive?

developer_response.body: We have done our best to create an enjoyable experience for our players. Non-violent, story-based adventure games, such as Down the Rabbit Hole, tend to have less replay value than some other genres but give the players a different kind of experience. If you have any feedback regarding how we could earn a higher rating than 1 star from you, we are all ears. Even though your kids finished the game in a day, we truly hope that they had a great time.

reviews.review_description: I tried multiple times to use the controller to touch the item, the clock to be specific, without success. Initially, I had a lot of difficulties using the controllers as well.  I need to get a refund for the game. Really sad about it.

developer_response.body: Hello Elicoming. We aren't aware of any bugs related to touching the clock, so we'd love to get more information from you, and of course we can help you advance beyond whatever the issue turns out to be. Please contact us at support@cortopia.com. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: At first i was skeptical about this game it seemed like i would get bored easily but my the way they made this game is truly unique and amazing i highly recommend if you want to have a true vr experience!!will definitely be looking for more games made by them
Great storytelling mesmerizing animation I just wish it was longer

This game is amazing. It has just the right mix of 3rd person control vs. 1st person immersion (you’ll see what I mean when you play).  Great puzzles, infinite detail, and a splash of corny jokes make this one a total winner.

I love jumping into this colorful weird world. The story is simple and ‚straight‘ but nevertheless it catches me all the time I start playing! I would recommend it for everybody who likes the beauty of VR and not only is searching for action, shooters and that stuff.

I enjoyed this game a lot. I wish it was a tad bit longer, but overall I loved every thing about the game. The characters are cute & the puzzles aren't hard at all & story line was very interesting. I recommend this game.
I love the graphics n the game play is incredible! You can really look into the rooms making you feel like your a giant stuck In a rabbit hole.

reviews.review_title: My first game ever on Vr
reviews.review_description:
Amazing graphics, functions. Overall it’s an easy game I think. I had to go over YouTube 2 or three times in order to get the solutions . Otherwise the game was smooth and easy. Very well done. It took me few hours to complete the game. I am slow Because I am 
not used to  vr.
I am new to using a VR game system and I thought this game was amazing.
Very cute game. Love that you can easily move the screen to reach objects!

I can only make it so far in this game before I have to quit. When going down the rabbit hole it prompts me to touch the clock…but no matter what button I press IT DOESNT WORK. 

So I quit. I was so excited to play this game. 
Disappointed

developer_response.body: Hey TheWilliamsons4. You have to touch the clock using the round blue orb that represents your finger. You do not need to press a button when touching the clock.

reviews.review_description: The immersive experience in this game feels a lot like a trip to Disneyland. Every detail is charming-do much to explore that you could never catch everything the first time.

I’ve loved Alice in Wonderland since childhood. I used to always have dreams as a child of falling down the rabbit hole or wondering what it would be like to actually be there. What an amazing experience to be able to immerse myself into my childhood dream and be transported into this immersive experience. I highly recommend this!

Very well done. I’m a computer science student and I was honestly mind blown with the creative setting of this game. The graphics, the storyline, the effects are so brilliant. I loved it. I wish I could wipe it out of my memory and play it again 

If you like fast action games, this may not be the best game for you, but if you fan just dive into a storyline and enjoy the amazing setting, then this is a must buy! 

The developers should really make more games like this, simply brilliant
The art and animation in this game are gorgeous. The story is so entertaining. The entire time I felt like I’d been dropped into a Disney movie scene.

reviews.review_title: Engaging perspective on a classic story!
reviews.review_description: My husband and I loved this game! We loved the overall story, the engaging perspective moving throughout the game, wonderful puzzles and collecting items.  This game keeps the player involved via multiple methods.

Now if seen the Grateful Dead quite a few times but this is visually breathtaking, my jaw dropped and a nice rolled off my tongue. Recommend to anyone and everyone. 

P.s the Grateful Dead has nothing to do with this review, I just like to say Grateful Dead.

Peace love and The Grateful Dead.

I am new to VR and this game got my attention. I was totally blown away! Graphics and quality of the game is insane….I really enjoy playing this game. The puzzles are challenging but not to the point of frustration, which I love. I highly recommend this game!
